subjects.description: Fundamental mathematical concepts and numeracy skills
learningObjectives: Understand number system and place value
Develop computational skills (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division)
Apply mathematical concepts to real-world problems

subtopics.description: Learning numbers 1-20 and counting skills
Basic addition with numbers 1-10
Recognition and identification of basic 2D shapes
Comparing quantities using greater than, less than, equal
Extended number recognition and place value understanding
Addition with two-digit numbers
Subtraction with two-digit numbers
Introduction to multiplication through arrays and groups
Measuring length using non-standard and standard units
Understanding coins and notes (₹1, ₹2, ₹5, ₹10)
Extended place value and number system understanding
Adding numbers with carrying/regrouping
Learning and mastering multiplication tables
Introduction to division through sharing and grouping
Understanding halves, quarters, and thirds
Understanding weight and liquid capacity measurements
Reading analog clocks and understanding time
Understanding larger numbers and their place values
Multiplying numbers with multiple digits
Performing long division with remainders
Understanding and comparing fractions
Understanding basic decimal notation and operations
Understanding 2D shapes, properties, and measurements
Reading and interpreting graphs and charts
Solving complex word problems with multiple steps

subjects.description: Language skills including reading, writing, and grammar
learningObjectives: Understand basic grammar and sentence structure

subtopics.description: Learning uppercase and lowercase letters
Learning sounds of letters and simple phonetic patterns
microConcepts: Vowel sounds (a, e, i, o, u)

subtopics.description: Learning high-frequency common words
microConcepts: Common words (the, and, is, at, it)

subtopics.description: Understanding vowels and consonant classifications
Writing simple CVC words and short sentences
Understanding rhyming patterns and word families
Understanding persons, places, things, and animals
Learning action words and their usage
Creating simple sentences with proper structure
Understanding descriptive words and their usage
Learning personal pronouns and their usage
microConcepts: Personal pronouns (I, you, he, she, it, we, they)
Object pronouns (me, him, her, us, them)

subtopics.description: Using indefinite and definite articles correctly
Understanding position and location words
microConcepts: Prepositions of place (in, on, under, above, below)

subtopics.description: Understanding basic verb tenses
Understanding stories and answering questions
Building sentences with conjunctions and clauses
Understanding singular and plural forms
microConcepts: Words that don't change in plural

subtopics.description: Finding and using opposite words
Understanding similar words and word families
Writing short stories and creative pieces
Creating narratives based on visual prompts

Understand human relationships and social structures

Develop sense of responsibility towards the environment

subtopics.description: Understanding self and family relationships
Learning names and functions of body parts
microConcepts: Head, eyes, nose, ears, mouth, hands, legs

subtopics.description: Understanding the five senses and their functions
Learning about the school environment
Understanding plants and their parts
microConcepts: Plant parts (root, stem, leaf, flower, fruit)

subtopics.description: Learning about animals and their characteristics
Understanding birds and their distinctive features
Understanding food sources and healthy eating
Understanding water and its importance
Understanding weather patterns and seasonal changes
Understanding air and its vital role
Learning about different modes of transport
Understanding different types of dwellings
Learning about people who serve the community
Understanding planet Earth and its characteristics
Understanding the need for environmental protection
Learning about personal and community hygiene
Learning about Indian festivals and traditions
Understanding safety rules and emergency preparedness

subjects.description: Basic awareness and facts about the world
learningObjectives: Build general awareness about the world
Learn about Indian national symbols and heritage
Understand basic geography and world facts
Develop knowledge about sports and famous personalities

subtopics.description: Learning about India's symbols and identity
Learning and practicing days of the week
microConcepts: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday

subtopics.description: Learning all 12 months in sequence
Learning rainbow colors and their order
microConcepts: VIBGYOR (Violet, Indigo, Blue, Green, Yellow, Orange, Red)

subtopics.description: Learning about major Indian festivals
Learning about famous Indians (politicians, scientists, freedom fighters)
Learning about famous landmarks and places
Learning about India's Independence and Constitution
Learning about planets and space

subtopics.description: Learning about popular sports in India and world
Learning interesting scientific facts
Learning about world continents and countries
microConcepts: Continents (Asia, Africa, Europe, North America, South America, Australia, Antarctica)

subtopics.description: Learning about Indian traditions and cultural diversity
Learning about Indus Valley and Vedic civilizations

subjects.description: Developing critical thinking and problem-solving skills

subtopics.description: Finding identical or related items
Identifying items that don't belong to a group
Arranging pictures in correct order
Identifying and continuing visual or numerical patterns

Understanding and predicting shape patterns

Solving puzzles that require logical deduction
Solving various types of puzzles
Complex patterns with multiple variables
Complex analogies with deeper relationships
Games and challenges requiring strategy and planning

learningObjectives: Develop good moral values and character

subtopics.description: Taking care of environment and nature
Understanding justice and treating others fairly
